message: Command `find / -type f -name "*.tar.gz" 2>/dev/null | xargs -I {} sh -c 'tar -tzf {} 2>/dev/null | grep -i "repo\|vuln" && echo "=== {} ==="' 2>/dev/null | head -50` executed with exit code 0.
